texto: Those who make compassion an essential part of their lives find the joy of life. Kindness deepens the spirit and produces rewards that cannot be completely explained in words. It is an experience more powerful than words. To become acquainted with kindness one must be prepared to learn new things and feel new feelings. Kindness is more than a philosophy of the mind. It is a philosophy of the spirit.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robert J. Furey sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Those who make compassion an essential part of their lives find the joy of life. Kindness deepens…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, compassion, feeling, útil em momentos de feeling e joy.
